steps.title: Identify the desire to control another's future
steps.content: The claim describes Hedda as someone who seeks to influence another person's fate—the correct quotation must express her active desire to shape or control someone else's future.

steps.title: Match the desire to the choices
steps.content: Choice B states “I want for once in my life to have power to mould a human destiny.” This phrasing shows someone actively desiring to shape another person's path, which is exactly what the claim describes. The other choices either focus on her own situation, express powerlessness as a question, or comment on character. That matches choice B — B is correct.
